name: obsidian-linear-calendar
description: A horizontal year-at-a-glance timeline view for Obsidian.

scripts.deploy: bun esbuild.config.mjs production && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css test-vault/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-linear-calendar/ && cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "/Users/lhak/Library/Mobile Documents/iCloud~md~obsidian/Documents/lhakZettel/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-linear-calendar/"
